steps.title: Translate large boxes
steps.content: Each large box takes $12$ minutes, so $x$ large boxes take $12x$ minutes.

steps.title: Translate small boxes
steps.content: For the small boxes, use the $6$-minute rate with the count $y$. That contributes $6y$ minutes to the daily total.

steps.title: Set the total time
steps.content: The machine runs for $720$ minutes total, so the equation is $$ 12x+6y=720 $$ The answer is B.
